title: Androrchis tenera
taxonomy: Androrchis tenera is classified as a species within the genus Androrchis, which is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae in the family Orchidaceae. This classification places Androrchis tenera within the larger group of orchids, a diverse and widespread family of flowering plants. Orchidaceae is a family within the order Asparagales, which also includes other plant families such as the agaves and asparagus. The order Asparagales is part of the larger clade monocots, a group that includes many different types of flowering plants. Androrchis tenera's classification is a way of organizing and understanding its evolutionary relationships to other plants.
uses: Androrchis tenera, a rare and exotic orchid species, has been studied for its potential medicinal properties.
